refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed to focus on minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid fault recovery, which are key contributors to operational availability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure actual uptime and downtime over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize unplanned downtime of the NGHE solution.
FR2: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery to restore availability.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement predictive maintenance and fault monitoring systems.
DP2: Design modular vehicle and system components for quick replacement.
DP3: Provide remote teleoperation and diagnostics to reduce recovery time.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement predictive maintenance and fault monitoring systems.

potential_sources: Dependency on real-time telemetry data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Interaction with Safety Services for fault alerts.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically isolates availability improvement through monitoring, minimizing coupling by using well-defined telemetry interfaces.

assumptions_risks: Risk of false positives/negatives in fault detection impacting availability.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating DP2 and DP3 in subsequent decomposition levels to address physical modularity and remote recovery.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Central system responsible for availability monitoring and management.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time operational data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Exchanges fault and safety status alerts with Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication with remote teleoperation and maintenance systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as availability monitoring is core to NGHE Solution; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle provides data but does not own availability logic; moderate diffusion risk if assigned here.
Teleoperation supports recovery but should not contain core availability logic to avoid diffusion.
Safety Services interface with alerts but are not responsible for availability management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing availability monitoring and fault detection in NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and improves ownership clarity.
containment_risks: Potential overload of NGHE Solution module with multiple responsibilities.
Dependency on timely and accurate telemetry data from other modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider splitting availability monitoring into submodules if diffusion risk increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (predictive maintenance and fault monitoring) directly addresses the refined FR sub-functions and is logically decoupled.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk by centralizing availability logic in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Availability can be verified via operational data collected through Telemetry and SafetyAlert interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of availability responsibility to NGHE Solution module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Plan for integration of physical modularity and teleoperation recovery in next decomposition level.
Validate telemetry data reliability assumptions during implementation.

decision.justification: Current decomposition level sufficiently refines the availability FR with a clear DP and IM assignment that passes all gates. Next steps involve detailed design and verification planning.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize unplanned downtime of the NGHE solution.
FR2: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery to restore availability.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; decomposition and assignments are consistent and feasible.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely.
Customer-defined availability target is stable and measurable.
open_risks: False fault detection impacting availability metrics.
Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Availability measurement results from pilot deployments.
